channel.title: CommunityAssembly on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in CommunityAssembly on Nature Works

item.title: Biodiversity Assembly
item.description:
Climate Assemblies are a thing, isn’t it time for a companion Biodversity Assembly? ?

I went to a KNOCA (Knowledge Network on Climate Assemblies) called Unheard Voices, very interesting. http://localhost:1313/blog/240122-biodiversity-assembly/

item.title: Young People’s Assemblies
item.description:
Reference links for Community Assemblies for young people, via Katie Reid

I went to KNOCA (knowledge network on climate assemblies) workshop Unheard Voices the other day, made contact with Katie Reid, who is doing a workshop on Young People’s Assemblies for KNOCA soon. http://localhost:1313/blog/240121-young-peoples-assemblies/

item.title: Workshop on Hearing Unheard Voices plus Biodiversity Collage
item.description:
I went to a workshop yesterday and a collage the day before, about deliberative democracy with a big dose of biodiversity

I went to a 3 hour workshop yesterday, Workshop on Hearing Unheard Voices: Listening to future generations and nonhuman nature in Climate Assemblies. http://localhost:1313/blog/240118-unheard/

item.title: Trust The People - Engaging Communities
item.description:
Workshop 2 in the Community Assembly training was engaging communities

I have started the Trust The People free Community Assembly course. http://localhost:1313/blog/231115-ttp-engaging-communities/

item.title: Community Assembly workshop
item.description:
Online workshop today about Community Assemblies, which are at the heart of a garden design I’m working on

Trust The People ran an online workshop about Community Assemblies. Their manual is available here. http://localhost:1313/blog/230720-community-assembly/
